name: lark-mcp
description: Lark / Feishu MCP server — integrate Claude with Lark Suite (messages, docs, calendar, bitable, approval workflows).

LARK_APP_ID.description: Lark App ID from Lark Developer Console

LARK_APP_SECRET.description: Lark App Secret from Lark Developer Console

LARK_DOMAIN.description: Lark domain: 'lark.com' for global, 'feishu.cn' for mainland China

LARK_TOOLSETS.description: Comma-separated list of tool groups to enable, e.g. 'im,docs,calendar,bitable'
